name: tipsboard-vscode
description: Markdown wiki and personal knowledge management workspace

commands.title: Tipsboard: Install Semantic Runtime from File...

tipsboard-vscode.vaultFolder.description: When using a multi-root workspace, vault root folder name matching a workspace folder, or absolute path.

tipsboard-vscode.maxAttachmentBytes.markdownDescription: Maximum size in bytes for each dropped attachment (images and other files). Default is 10 MiB.
tipsboard-vscode.maxAttachmentBytes.description: Maximum attachment size in bytes per file.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.provider.markdownDescription:
Semantic search (meaning-based search from the wand button in the Tipsboard panel).

- **bundled** (default): local Transformers.js runtime. If missing, Tipsboard can download or install a runtime pack.
- **off**: disables semantic search.

On closed networks, use `importedPath` / **Install Semantic Runtime from File** and set **Allow Remote Models** to `false` with a pre-deployed model cache.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.modelId.markdownDescription: Hugging Face model id for local semantic search (Transformers.js). First use downloads weights into the model cache unless **Allow Remote Models** is `false`.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.allowRem.markdownDescription: Default `true`: download missing embedding models from Hugging Face on first use. Set `false` on offline networks, download models from the Hugging Face links in Tipsboard settings, and place them in the model cache folder (**Tipsboard: Reveal Semantic Model Cache** or **Model Cache Path**).
tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.allowRem.description: Allow downloading embedding models from Hugging Face Hub.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.modelCac.markdownDescription: Optional absolute path for the embedding model cache. When empty, Tipsboard uses its default folder (open via **Tipsboard: Reveal Semantic Model Cache**). For offline install, download models from Hugging Face (links in Tipsboard settings) into that folder.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.mode.markdownDescription: Semantic search ranking mode. `hybrid` combines dense similarity with a local BM25 lexical score and lightweight reranking. `dense` uses embedding similarity only before reranking.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.denseWei.markdownDescription: Dense embedding score weight used when semantic search mode is `hybrid`.
tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.denseWei.description: Dense score weight for hybrid semantic search.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.bm25Weig.markdownDescription: BM25 lexical score weight used when semantic search mode is `hybrid`.
tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.bm25Weig.description: BM25 score weight for hybrid semantic search.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.imported.markdownDescription: Optional absolute path to a prepared semantic runtime folder (e.g. unzipped output of `npm run prepare:semantic-pack`). When set, it is used instead of the managed runtime in global storage. Must contain `manifest.json` and `node_modules/@huggingface/transformers`.

tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.runtimeD.markdownDescription: Base URL used to download Tipsboard semantic runtime packs. The extension appends `tipsboard-semantic-runtime-<platform>-<arch>.zip`.
tipsboard-vscode.semanticSearch.runtimeD.description: Semantic runtime pack download base URL.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
scripts.build:webview: npm install --prefix webview && npm run build --prefix webview
